audio.description: Base64-encoded WAV audio data. Must contain a valid RIFF header.

duration.description: Duration of this keyframe in seconds.

targets.description: Map of expression names to target weights (0.0 to 1.0). The weight is set immediately and held for the duration. Expressions not listed are reset to 0. Common lip-sync targets include "aa", "ih", "ou", "ee", "oh".

keyframes.description: Ordered list of expression keyframes synchronized with the audio.

waitForCompletion.description: If true (default), the request blocks until audio playback completes. If false, returns immediately after queuing.

transitionDuration.description: Duration in seconds for smoothstep blending between adjacent keyframes. Defaults to 0.05 (50ms). Clamped to 40% of each keyframe's duration.
